user.title: Pimoroni Unicorn
user.description: Enter the Device ID configured in the firmware. Ensure the device is connected to the same MQTT broker as Home Assistant.

data.extra_sensors: Extra sensors (one per line: entity_id topic_suffix)

data_description.extra_sensors:
Each line: entity_id followed by a topic suffix. Published to [device_id]/[topic_suffix] every 10 seconds.
Example:
sensor.indoor_temperature indoor_temp
sensor.co2 co2
data_description.show_panel: Adds the Unicorn Layout editor to the sidebar. Turn off to remove it; can be re-enabled here anytime.

add_icon.title: Install LaMetric icon
add_icon.description: Enter a numeric icon code from the LaMetric gallery. The icon is fetched and previewed before installing.

icon_preview.title: Preview & name icon
icon_preview.description:
Icon {code} ({frames} frame(s)) — preview (shown at actual 8×8 size, zoom in if needed):

![icon]({url})

Choose a name to install it on all devices. The code {code} will also work as an alias in notifications.

import_layout.title: Import layout
import_layout.description: Paste a layout JSON authored in the emulator (scripts/emulate.py layout). It is stored by its name and pushed to this device.

toggle_widgets.title: Enable/disable widgets
toggle_widgets.description: Selected widgets are shown; unselected are hidden.

error.icon_not_found: No icon found for that code, or the gallery is unreachable.
error.name_taken: That name is already used by a built-in icon.
error.invalid_layout: Not a valid layout JSON (needs a "widgets" list).

send_notification.name: Send notification
send_notification.description: Show a notification on a Pimoroni Unicorn display.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Pimoroni Unicorn device to notify.

message.name: Message
message.description: Text to show (scrolls if it does not fit).

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Built-in icon name, an installed LaMetric icon name, or its gallery code.

sound.name: Sound
sound.description: Sound effect to play (audio models only).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Minimum seconds to show (auto-extends to finish scrolling text).

color.name: Text colour
color.description: RGB colour for the message text (default white).

outlined.name: Outlined text
outlined.description: Draw a black outline around the text.

hold.name: Hold
hold.description: Keep showing until dismissed or replaced.

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of full scroll passes for overflowing text.

stack.name: Stack
stack.description: If off, replace the current notification immediately.

wakeup.name: Wake up
wakeup.description: Show even while the display is asleep.

dismiss_notification.name: Dismiss notification
dismiss_notification.description: Dismiss the active notification on a Pimoroni Unicorn display.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Pimoroni Unicorn device to dismiss on.

push_firmware.name: Push firmware to device
push_firmware.description: Stage firmware files and send an OTA update command over MQTT. The device validates, writes, and reboots automatically.

files.name: Files to push
files.description: Which firmware files to push (defaults to main). Bare names get .py appended and land in the device root.

file_content.name: Inline file content
file_content.description: Optional map of file key to content string, used instead of reading from disk.
